query_normalized: predicting gene regulatory network dynamics from time-series rna-seq data biology
rationale: The paper focuses on predicting bulk RNA-seq expression levels from histology images (WSI), whereas the user's question concerns inferring Gene Regulatory Network dynamics from time-series RNA-seq data. This represents a distinct construct sharing only the keyword "RNA-Seq" but differing fundamentally in input modality, output target, and biological mechanism.
